data.description: Company's stock ownership information show 13% increase in holdings.

data.title: TradeZero Expands European Presence into Belgium, Luxembourg, Norway, and Denmark
data.description: In a recent announcement, TradeZero Europe B.V. revealed its expansion into Belgium, Luxembourg, Norway, and Denmark, in addition to its existing services in the Netherlands. This move marks a significant step towards their mission to extend their services in more countries. The expansion comes after TradeZero Europe's successful launch in the Netherlands.

data.title: Allergan Aesthetics Ushers in a New Age of Hyaluronic Acid (HA) Injectables with JUVÉDERM® at AMWC Monaco
data.description: New research shows a growing trend in the industry towards achieving "undetectable" aesthetics, with individuals opting for a natural and personalized look that offers subtle rejuvenation and is nearly imperceptible. Key healthcare experts shared these insights at a recent event hosted by Allergan Aesthetics. This shift underscores a desire for a more refined appearance, with 1 and 2 indicating specific statistics mentioned in the study, further emphasizing the increasing preference for a discreet and natural approach to aesthetics.

data.title: GIGABYTE Z890 AORUS ELITE DUO X Now Available Featuring CQDIMM Leading Z890 Plus Series
data.description: In Taipei on March 26, 2026, GIGABYTE, a prominent computer brand, revealed the launch of the Z890 Plus series motherboards tailored to support the latest Intel® Core™ Ultra 200S Plus series processors. Leading the lineup is the Z890 AORUS ELITE DUO X. This release ushers in a new era of high-performance computing with exceptional features.

data.title: miel Introduces Jacquard Stripe Shirt by ichi Antiquite's to Experience Japanese Natural Fashion
data.description: A new clothing item, the Jacquard Stripe Shirt (Style No.1100916), has been introduced by the Japanese boutique miel. This boutique is operated by chambrette Corporation, a leading Japanese apparel company headquartered in Sayama, Japan. The shirt is designed by the renowned Japanese brand ichi Antiquite's and is now available on miel's website (https://mielshop.jp). This announcement was made on March 26, 2026.
Borregaard ASA releases 2025 annual report, highlighting strong financial performance and growth.

data.title: Tryg A/S - Q1 2026 pre-silent newsletter
data.description: Starting on March 26, Tryg will hold analyst calls and meetings before the release of their Q1 2026 results on April 15. This serves to update capital market participants on the important factors impacting the company's recent financial performance.
2025 financial report and 2026 AGM notice released, marking a successful year for the company.

data.title: Financial results for the full year 2025 released, show a 10% increase in revenue compared to 2024.
data.description: Recently, it was reported that the annual revenue of a major tech company reached a record-breaking $100 billion, showcasing a remarkable increase of 15% compared to the previous year. The company also disclosed a profit of $20 billion for the same period, marking a 25% rise from the previous year. This surge in revenue and profit is attributed to the strong performance of their flagship products and successful strategic investments. Additionally, the company reported a significant growth in its user base, with over 500 million active users worldwide, solidifying its position as a leading player in the tech industry.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer completes Eastern European rollout of Libra legal AI workspace with four-country launch
data.description: In Alphen aan den Rijn, Netherlands, Wolters Kluwer Legal & Regulatory has introduced Libra by Wolters Kluwer, a specialized legal AI workspace, in Czech Republic, Slovakia, Hungary, and Romania. This expansion marks Wolters Kluwer's completion of its Eastern Europe rollout and enhances the European reach of Libra by Wolters Kluwer. The platform combines reliable legal resources with advanced AI technologies and is now accessible in a total of four countries.

data.title: Implantica publishes Year-end Report, January - December 2025 (Q4)
data.description: In Vaduz, Liechtenstein, as of March 26, 2026, the highly anticipated launch of RefluxStop® in the US is drawing near, pending approval from the FDA. Notably, in the fourth quarter, several significant milestones were achieved. The FDA conducted a total of six pre-approval inspections, encompassing manufacturing facilities, Quality System assessments, and inspections under the Bioresearch Monitoring Program (BIMO). These inspections are vital steps towards the approval process and signify progress toward bringing RefluxStop® to the US market.

data.title: Sweco publishes Annual Report for 2025
data.description: In the year 2025, Sweco, a prominent architecture and engineering consultancy based in Europe, achieved significant success and fortified its position in the industry. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SWEC-B, capitalized on its team of 23,000 experts who collaborated closely with clients to meet their needs. Sweco successfully executed its strategic objectives, showcasing its expertise and commitment to excellence in the field.

data.title: SHEIN's 2025 Global Circularity Study Highlights How Consumers Buy, Use and Manage Clothing
data.description: In Singapore on March 26, 2026, a renowned online fashion and lifestyle retailer, SHEIN, disclosed key details from its 2025 Global Circularity Study. This study delves into the behaviors of SHEIN consumers regarding the acquisition, utilization, and maintenance of clothing throughout its lifespan. The study was carried out over several weeks starting in November, providing valuable information on consumer trends and habits.
BioPorto releases their 2025 Annual Report with record revenue of $50 million.

data.title: UK to impose temporary ban on political crypto donations through amendment to the Representation of the People Bill from March 25.
data.description: The government intends to enforce a ban by modifying the Representation of the People Bill, with amendments applying retroactively from March 25.

data.title: Coinbase resists Senate's stablecoin yield terms in crypto bill, stalling legislation progress.
data.description: Reportedly, Coinbase is resisting proposed stablecoin yield regulations in the Senate's crypto market bill, causing previous attempts to progress the legislation to fail. The resistance has proven to be a significant obstacle in moving forward with the bill and addressing key issues in the crypto market. The exact numbers and details of the provisions being contested have not been disclosed publicly.
Multitude Group Annual Report published: Confirming strong performance and profitability

data.title: New proposed bill aims to prohibit US president and Congress from engaging in prediction markets amid increasing legislative and state-level efforts. This comes as scrutiny intensifies over sports betting, war contracts, and alleged insider trading.
data.description: Recent legislation at both the federal and state levels is focusing on prediction markets, amidst increasing concern regarding sports betting, war contracts, and suspected insider trading. This bill is part of a broader movement that has gained momentum, with a growing number of actions being taken in this area. The increased scrutiny highlights the importance of addressing issues related to prediction markets, with significant implications for various sectors.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Is Bringing Its ETFs Tracking Stocks, Gold On-Chain For The First Time
data.description: Ondo Finance (CRYPTO: ONDO) has announced a partnership with Franklin Templeton to tokenize the asset manager's exchange-traded funds. Through this collaboration, Franklin Templeton-managed ETFs including FFOG, FLQL, FGDL, FLHY, and INCE will be tokenized. This development marks the debut of tokenized FT-managed ETFs available on-chain, as disclosed by Ondo Finance. These tokenized ETFs will be accessible through Ondo Global Markets.

data.title: For the African Market, Tongwei Solar Showcases High-Efficiency Cell Products and Technology Strength at Solar & Storage Live Africa 2026
data.description: In Africa, there is increasing demand for efficient and sustainable solar products, leading to Tongwei Solar, a Chinese manufacturer of crystalline silicon solar cells, participating in Solar & Storage Live Africa 2026 on March 25. This event showcased advancements in solar technology to meet the needs of the continent.
